name: glazebid-v2
description: GlazeBid v2 — Legacy Builder UI + New Studio Takeoff Engine

scripts.dev:builder: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --workspace apps/builder" "npm run dev --workspace apps/studio" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.dev:studio: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev --workspace apps/studio" "wait-on tcp:5174 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5174 electron ."
